label: Hediff giver (add severity)
description: Continuously adds severity to a hediff at a fixed amount on a mean-time-between schedule.

partsToAffect.label: Parts to affect
partsToAffect.description: Body parts this giver can affect. Empty means all parts.

canAffectAnyLivePart.label: Can affect any live part
canAffectAnyLivePart.description: If true, this giver can affect any live body part.

allowOnLodgers.label: Allow on lodgers
allowOnLodgers.description: If true, this giver can apply to lodger pawns.

allowOnQuestRewardPawns.label: Allow on quest reward pawns
allowOnQuestRewardPawns.description: If true, this giver can apply to quest reward pawns.

allowOnQuestReservedPawns.label: Allow on quest reserved pawns
allowOnQuestReservedPawns.description: If true, this giver can apply to quest reserved pawns.

allowOnBeggars.label: Allow on beggars
allowOnBeggars.description: If true, this giver can apply to beggar pawns.

countToAffect.label: Count to affect
countToAffect.description: Number of body parts to affect.

mtbHours.label: MTB hours
mtbHours.description: Mean time in hours between severity additions.
